name: Feyd

skills.name: Jade Carriage - View from Above
skills.description: Can jump onto and walk on natural walls while gaining Movement Speed. Basic Attack becomes ranged while on a wall.

skills.name: Jade Chase - Returning Strike
skills.description: Dashes, dealing damage to enemies in his path and launching them. Enhances his next 2 Basic Attacks. Enhanced Basic Attacks deal extra damage and restore Health.

skills.name: Hardened Jade Seal
skills.description: Deals damage and marks nearby enemies. Using the skill again unleashes 4 strikes of damage and restores his Health. If a marked enemy's Health is below a certain threshold, the last strike deals grievous damage. When on a wall, he can use this skill to jump down.

tips: Feyd (Assassin): Tier B on international ranked — 51.09% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Resistance, Blazing Cape.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.09%, pick 0.41%, ban 0.07%, popularity tier B.
